commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed because this open implementation PR has no narrow blocking finding; the remaining action is exact-head checks and maintainer merge review.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the local npm registry and tarball generation are confined to upgrade-survivor test fixtures. (sha=67ba8ac0020415f8a6b1dd8a11ddf582380fd3ac)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes doctor/plugin repair sequencing and plugin auto-enable to repair configured missing official plugins such as Discord and Brave, re-enable repaired provider plugins, preserve entries on install failure or update passes, add regression and upgrade-survivor coverage, update doctor docs/changelog, and refresh one Korean locale string.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows validation still warns for plugins.allow ids without a matching manifest while channel auto-enable can derive and allowlist configured channel ids; the linked report also gives a concrete v2026.5.2 restart reproduction.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because this open implementation PR has no narrow blocking finding; the remaining action is exact-head checks and maintainer merge review.

target.title: fix(config): exempt known channel ids from plugins.allow stale warning (#76872)
target.author: jack-stormentswe
